body:
## What changed
- Refreshes `site/asset-manifest.json` from the current static `site/` tree, including referenced image assets and `signin.js`.
- Restores `npm run test:static-site-asset-references` so it runs the manifest `--check` before the static reference tests.
- Removes the stale `signin.js` ban from the static asset reference test; missing local index references are now covered by the general shipped-asset and manifest-reference assertions.

## Validation
- `npm run test:static-site-asset-references`
- `node --test scripts/check-live-site.test.js --test-name-pattern "asset manifest"`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `node --check scripts/static-site-asset-references.test.js`
- `git diff --check`
title: static-site: bind manifest to index references
